# Isaac Vazquez

> Product Manager and UC Berkeley Haas MBA Candidate with 5+ years building SaaS products reaching 60M+ users. Case studies, product thinking, and PM frameworks.

## About

Isaac Vazquez is a Technical Product Manager and UC Berkeley Haas MBA Candidate (Class of 2027). He has 6+ years of experience in SaaS and consumer technology, with a background spanning product strategy, quality engineering, and cross-functional leadership. He is a Consortium Fellow and MLT Professional Development Fellow.

- Website: https://isaacavazquez.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/isaac-vazquez/
- GitHub: https://github.com/IsaacAVazquez
- Email: isaacavazquez95@gmail.com

## Sections

### Portfolio & Case Studies
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/portfolio
- Description: Product management case studies showcasing strategic thinking, cross-functional leadership, and measurable business outcomes. Each follows a Problem-Process-Result framework. Highlights include scaling platforms to 60M+ users and driving $4M revenue impact.

### About
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/about
- Description: Professional background, career journey, and product management philosophy.

### Resume
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/resume
- Description: Professional resume with experience at Civitech, and education at UC Berkeley Haas and Florida State University.

### Writing
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/writing
- Description: Articles on product management, product strategy, data-driven decisions, and lessons from an MBA journey.

### Contact
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/contact
- Description: Get in touch for product management opportunities, consulting, or collaboration.

### Fantasy Football Analytics
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/fantasy-football
- Description: Live fantasy football tier rankings (QB/RB/WR/TE/K/DST/Flex) with interactive D3.js visualizations, clustering algorithms, and draft assistance tools.

## Expertise

- Product Strategy & Roadmapping
- Product Discovery & User Research
- Experimentation & A/B Testing
- Cross-Functional Leadership
- Data Analysis & Analytics
- Go-to-Market Planning
- Stakeholder Management
- Quality Assurance & Test Automation
